title: PACT Message Register Entry
description: An entry in the append-only Message Register. Only visible to human custodians. Records the original and delivered content of all mediated communications.

recipientId.description: Target agent, or null for broadcast.

originalContent.description: Content as submitted by the sender (before mediation).

deliveredContent.description: Content as delivered to the recipient (after mediation). Null when mediationAction is 'blocked'.

mediationReason.description: Why the mediator applied this action.

disclosureLevel.description: Graduated disclosure level applied (1=metadata only, 2=category, 3=full content, 4=human-only).
